computerReply: Transfer complete. USS Enterprise now under command of Captain Jean-Luc Picard.
situationalContext: Picard and Riker enter the Bridge. Troi is still in her blue uniform but Data is back in his gold one with two pips.
userQuery: Just the way you left it, maybe a little better. Computer, transfer all command codes to Captain Jean-Luc Picard. Voice authorisation Jellico alpha three one.
